rationale: The cited paper is a meta-analysis of price elasticity determinants (including endogeneity effects), while the citing paper’s main contribution is a new simulated-moments estimator for endogeneity in panel mixed-logit choice; this suggests topical relevance but not clearly a core methodological dependency. The citing note names other work (e.g., Villas-Boas and Winer 1999) as the primary extension target, and the matched evidence provides only a DOI-level bibliography match with no in-text citation context. Given this sparse evidence, it cannot be safely dropped as an obvious mention-only citation.
